title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.1452 - Election of board of directors, no person to cast more than one ballot
text:
67.1452.  Election of board of directors, no person to cast more than one ballot. — In any election for the board of directors of a community improvement district as established in sections 67.1401 to 67.1571, no person shall cast more than* one ballot.
(L. 2015 S.B. 497 § 1) 
*Word "that" appears in original rolls.
